label: 场景结构
description: 原样透传 scene，并在节点下方以可展开列表展示完整逻辑树结构（含各节点体素数统计）。用于调试、检查 scene 层级与 focus 上下文。
description-en: Pass scene through unchanged and show an expandable tree of the full logical hierarchy below the node, including per-node voxel counts. Useful for debugging scene structure and focus context.

inputs.name: scene
inputs.label: scene
inputs.description: 输入 scene；整棵 DataTree 将被原样透传，并在 UI 中展示其逻辑树
inputs.description-en: Input scene; the entire DataTree is passed through unchanged and rendered as a structure tree.

outputs.name: scene
outputs.label: scene
outputs.description: 与输入完全一致的 scene（同一棵 DataTree，结构零变换）
outputs.description-en: The same scene as the input (identical DataTree, zero transform).
